name: well_harness.demo_answer.asset
description: Lightweight regression contract for deterministic demo answers. This is not a JSON Schema.

cases.prompt: 触发 logic3 会发生什么
required_evidence_fragments: nominal-deploy: logic3 在约 1.9s 触发。
changed_conditions: tra_deg -7.0->-14.0 <= -11.74
controller_outputs.eec_deploy_cmd False->True
events@1.9s: logic3_active False->True; eec_deploy_cmd False->True; pls_power_cmd False->True; pdu_motor_cmd False->True
required_outcome_fragments: logic3 触发后，EEC deploy、PLS power、PDU motor 命令在同一 trace window 置为 1。
logic3 不是 throttle lock release

cases.prompt: 触发 THR_LOCK 会发生什么
required_evidence_fragments: nominal-deploy: thr_lock 在约 5.0s 触发。
events@5.0s: deploy_90_percent_vdt False->True; logic4_active False->True; throttle_lock_release_cmd False->True
upstream_status: name=logic4_active source=logic_diagnosis observed=True time=5.0s
upstream_status: name=throttle_lock_release_cmd source=event observed=True time=5.0s
required_outcome_fragments: THR_LOCK release command 是当前 deploy demo 链路的末端释放命令。
它是 logic4 之后的末端释放命令节点

cases.prompt: 为什么 logic4 还没满足
required_evidence_fragments: node=logic4; category=logic; checkpoint=4.9s; eventual_trigger=5.0s。
blocked_status: name=deploy_90_percent_vdt source=explain_condition observed=False checkpoint=4.9s value=False required=True
blocked_status: name=tra_deg source=explain_condition observed=True checkpoint=4.9s value=-14 required=between_lower_inclusive -32..0
logic4 explain@4.9s failed_conditions: deploy_90_percent_vdt。
events@5.0s: deploy_90_percent_vdt False->True; logic4_active False->True; throttle_lock_release_cmd False->True
required_risk_fragments: blocked-state comparison 只说明 nominal-deploy 中触发前最近一拍的 evidence 缺口

cases.prompt: 为什么 THR_LOCK 还没释放
required_evidence_fragments: node=thr_lock; category=command; checkpoint=4.9s; eventual_trigger=5.0s。
blocked_status: name=deploy_90_percent_vdt source=trace_field observed=False checkpoint=4.9s value=False required=True
blocked_status: name=throttle_lock_release_cmd source=trace_field observed=False checkpoint=4.9s value=False required=True
logic4 explain@4.9s failed_conditions: deploy_90_percent_vdt。
events@5.0s: deploy_90_percent_vdt False->True; logic4_active False->True; throttle_lock_release_cmd False->True
required_outcome_fragments: logic4_active 和 throttle_lock_release_cmd 都还没有满足
required_risk_fragments: blocked-state comparison 只说明 nominal-deploy 中触发前最近一拍的 evidence 缺口

cases.prompt: 为什么 throttle lock 没释放
required_evidence_fragments: nominal-deploy: throttle_lock_release_cmd 随 logic4 在约 5.0s 从 0->1。
logic4 触发前 failed_conditions: deploy_90_percent_vdt。
changed_conditions: deploy_90_percent_vdt False->True == True
context_changes: plant_sensors.deploy_90_percent_vdt False->True
events@5.0s: deploy_90_percent_vdt False->True; logic4_active False->True; throttle_lock_release_cmd False->True
required_outcome_fragments: throttle lock 不是永久没释放
它约 5.0s 才随 logic4 释放

cases.prompt: logic4 和 throttle lock 有什么关系
required_evidence_fragments: bridge=logic4->THR_LOCK; checkpoint=4.9s; eventual_trigger=5.0s。
logic4 是上游 logic gate
throttle_lock_release_cmd / THR_LOCK 是下游末端释放命令
blocked-state 解释 checkpoint gate 为什么未满足：logic4 explain@4.9s failed_conditions: deploy_90_percent_vdt。
diagnose_problem 解释下游 release 为什么在该窗口尚未发生
events@5.0s: deploy_90_percent_vdt False->True; logic4_active False->True; throttle_lock_release_cmd False->True
required_outcome_fragments: 4.9s checkpoint 时 logic4 仍被 deploy_90_percent_vdt 卡住
required_risk_fragments: bridge summary 只桥接 nominal-deploy 的现有 evidence

cases.prompt: 如果把 logic3 的 TRA 阈值从 -11.74 改成 -8，会发生什么
required_evidence_fragments: 当前 logic3 TRA 条件来自 DeployController.explain: tra_deg <= -11.74。
当前 nominal-deploy 中 logic3 首次激活约 1.9s。
dry-run 仅在现有 trace row 上用阈值 -8 重新跑 DeployController.explain
changed_conditions: tra_deg -7.0->-14.0 <= -11.74
required_outcome_fragments: 把阈值改成 -8 不会改变首次满足 logic3 的 trace row
-8 与 -11.74 都是在同一个 1.9s row 首次满足
required_risk_fragments: 更早触发 logic3 可能更早输出 EEC deploy、PLS power、PDU motor。
logic4 / THR_LOCK 仍取决于 deploy_90_percent_vdt
